infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Soul Health needs your location once to calculate precise prayer times for Azan notifications.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Soul Health adds your daily prayer times to your calendar so you can plan around them.
infoPlist.NSRemindersUsageDescription: Soul Health adds your prayer times as tasks so you can track and check them off in Google Tasks or Apple Reminders.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Soul Health needs your location once to calculate precise prayer times for Azan notifications.

plugins.calendarPermission: Soul Health adds your daily prayer times to your calendar so you can plan around them.
